Overrides.Override: Enemies Poisoned by you have 10% of Physical Damage they deal converted to Chaos Limited to 1 Runegraft of Rotblood
Elusive's Effect on you is increased instead for the first 2 seconds Limited to 1 Runegraft of the Agile
15% increased Reservation Efficiency of Skills Auras from your Skills which affect Allies also affect Enemies Limited to 1 Runegraft of Treachery

Items.Item: Rarity: RARE Rapture Urge Warlock Boots Energy Shield: 204 EnergyShieldBasePercentile: 1 Unique ID: fd3beafec993f28d72167479afc887b163c05629c553b7ead938ed49fd7c5685 Item Level: 86 Quality: 26 Sockets: W-B-W-W LevelReq: 84 Implicits: 2 Poisons you inflict deal Damage 9% faster +1% to maximum Fire Resistance {fractured}+126 to maximum Life +55 to Intelligence 95% increased Energy Shield +26% to Fire Resistance +33% to Chaos Resistance {crafted}20% increased Movement Speed {crafted}100% chance to Avoid being Chilled
